name: Pylon
one_liner: AI-native B2B customer support platform that unifies ticketing, omnichannel messaging (Slack, Teams, email), knowledge base, and account intelligence into a single post-sales operating system.

ambiguities: Multiple companies named 'Pylon' in fintech exist (usepylon.com B2B support platform vs. pylonlending.com mortgage-as-a-service); this record covers usepylon.com, the higher-profile entity with $51M raised. The sector hint 'fintech' is a loose fit — Pylon is primarily enterprise/B2B SaaS with fintech customers.
Tracxn cites 135 employees as of March 2026; the Aug 2025 Series B blog references 51 team members, suggesting rapid growth since then — current headcount treated as estimate.
startupintros.com cites $79M total raised across 6 rounds, but this conflicts with the company's own blog stating $51M after Series B; the company-official figure ($51M) is used.
